title: Atztec adventures
description: Play minecraft in the ancient aztec era
body:
# **Aztec adventures**
Aztec adventures takes minecraft back in time to the aztec era. It has two new bosses in structures. The modpack is challenging but if you know what you are doing it is pretty easy. this modpack transforms jungles into dangerous rainforests that house many ancient structures
# [Do you want a server?](https://bisecthosting.com/jalnyr)
